title: gymnosporia lanceolata
intro: Gymnosporia lanceolata, also known as the 'cancer bush' or 'khatoma', is a shrub-like plant native to tropical Africa. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, which can be used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and even certain types of cancer. The plant is also known to offer several health benefits, including reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Traditionally, Gymnosporia lanceolata is used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are made by boiling the leaves and stems in water to extract its medicinal compounds.
